apply-hash.doc: hash-verified application of the cheatsheet onto the target artifact; bespoke integrity gate

apply-handback.doc: owner handback record; conductor-owned, no unit persona

hash-bound-smoke.doc: smoke attestation hash-bound to scaffold content; bespoke integrity gate

authorized-full-run.doc: human-gated detached resource run; not an agent gate

hash-bound-eval.doc: eval run hash-bound to checkpoint + eval-spec; bespoke integrity gate

spec-atomic-transaction.doc: owner atomic PRD transaction with version snapshot; conductor-owned
